items.title: Fix CompileAndRun crash
items.description: ConsoleUtilSSE-style relocation fix (RELOCATION_ID 441582 for patch >= 1130). Credit: VersuchDrei/ConsoleUtilSSE, MIT License.

items.title: SEH crash protection
items.description: __try/__except around CompileAndRun catches access violations safely.

items.title: God mode via direct API
items.description: Static bool flip via RELOCATION_ID(517711, 404238). No console command.

items.title: Collision toggle via direct API
items.description: TESObjectREFR::SetCollision(). No console command.

items.title: Time control via direct API
items.description: Calendar::gameHour->value direct write for SetGameTime.

items.title: Connection health monitoring
items.description: Ping action for pipe connectivity check.

items.title: Named pipe architecture
items.description: SKSE plugin pipe server + C# MCP pipe client. JSON protocol, newline-delimited.

items.title: SKSE task thread dispatch
items.description: All game API calls marshaled to game thread via SKSE::GetTaskInterface with promise/future.

items.title: Static linking
items.description: x64-windows-static vcpkg triplet eliminates external DLL dependencies.

items.title: HUD notifications
items.description: RE::DebugNotification for in-game messages. Auto-notify on god mode, collision, items, stats, save.

items.title: Console command execution
items.description: ExecuteConsoleCommand with output capture via lastMessage. Dot-notation for NPC targeting (refId.command).

items.title: Async save game
items.description: BGSSaveLoadManager::Save() with fire-and-forget from Protocol. Auto-names from player info.

items.title: Event system noise filtering
items.description: Hardcoded suppression of framework quests (FEBD3801, 000F9075). Poll filters: eventTypes, excludeTypes.

items.title: prid doesn't persist between calls
items.description: Workaround: use dot-notation (refId.command). Tool descriptions updated to guide AI to correct pattern.

items.title: Save game timeout
items.description: Fixed via async save — responds immediately, save completes in background.

items.title: Teleport via direct API
items.description: Currently works via coc console command. No clean direct API found yet.

items.title: Player info query
items.description: Name, race, level, health/magicka/stamina (current+base), position, cell, worldspace.

items.title: Full inventory read
items.description: All items with FormID, name, count, weight, value, type classification.

items.title: Gold count
items.description: Direct gold query via inventory filter.

items.title: Add/remove items
items.description: AddObjectToContainer/RemoveItem with FormID resolution.

items.title: Set actor values
items.description: All 18 skills + health/magicka/stamina via AsActorValueOwner()->SetActorValue().

items.title: Equip/unequip items
items.description: ActorEquipManager::EquipObject/UnequipObject.

items.title: Add/remove spells
items.description: PlayerCharacter::AddSpell, console command fallback for remove.

items.title: Add/remove perks
items.description: PlayerCharacter::AddPerk, console command fallback for remove.

items.title: Active effects query
items.description: AsMagicTarget()->GetActiveEffectList() with magnitude, duration, elapsed.

items.title: Skill levels query
items.description: GetSkillLevels — all 18 skills with current and base values.

items.title: Perks query
items.description: GetPerks — all acquired perks with rank information.

items.title: Known spells query
items.description: GetKnownSpells — all spells with school, type, magnitude, duration.

items.title: Known shouts query
items.description: GetKnownShouts — all shouts with per-word detail and unlock status.

items.title: Equipped items query
items.description: GetEquippedItems — all biped slots + wielded weapons.

items.title: Unlock shouts
items.description: UnlockShout — teachword + unlockword for shout or individual word.

items.title: Character blueprint export
items.description: GetCharacterBlueprint — single call exporting skills, perks, spells, shouts, equipment, inventory, gold, effects.

items.title: Level management
items.description: Set level, add XP, show XP to next level.

items.title: Appearance query
items.description: Read race, sex, head parts, face morphs (19 facial values via TESNPC::FaceData).

items.title: Carry weight management
items.description: Read/set carry weight, show encumbrance status.

items.title: Favorites management
items.description: Read/write spell and item favorites via MagicFavorites.

items.title: NPC FormID confusion — refId vs baseId
items.description: get_nearby_npcs now returns both refId and baseId. Tool descriptions clarify which to use.

items.title: Hit events misattributed
items.description: Hit events now include targetRole/attackerRole (player/follower/other) and IsPlayerTeammate check.

items.title: Weather control
items.description: Get/set current weather (clear, rain, snow, storm), wind speed/direction.

items.title: Cell info query
items.description: Current cell details — interior/exterior, water, lighting, encounter zone.

items.title: Object interaction
items.description: Lock/unlock doors, activate objects, read container contents.

items.title: Map markers
items.description: Discover/undiscover markers, list discovered locations. MapMarkerFramework integration potential.

items.title: Placed object query
items.description: Find specific objects in current cell (chests, crafting stations, NPCs).

items.title: Active quests query
items.description: GetQuestInfo — all active quests with stages and objectives.

items.title: Quest stage query
items.description: GetQuestStage — specific quest by FormID with objectives.

items.title: Set quest stage
items.description: SetQuestStage via setstage console command.

items.title: Start/stop quests
items.description: TESQuest::Start()/Stop() direct API.

items.title: Complete quest objectives
items.description: Via completeallobjectives console command.

items.title: Quest stage browser
items.description: List all stages for a quest, show which are completed.

items.title: Quest variable read
items.description: Read quest script variables — safe alternative to sqv.

items.title: Quest item tracking
items.description: List items flagged as quest objects, which quest they belong to.

items.title: Quest alias resolution
items.description: Resolve quest aliases to actual NPCs/objects.

items.title: Nearby NPC detection
items.description: GetNearbyNPCs with refId, baseId, name, race, level, distance, hostility, essential status.

items.title: Actor info query
items.description: GetActorInfo by FormID with health, position, combat state, essential status.

items.title: Move actor to target
items.description: Actor::MoveTo() direct API.

items.title: Set relationship rank
items.description: Via setrelationshiprank console command.

items.title: Kill actor
items.description: KillActor — removes essential flag, calls KillImmediate(). Direct API.

items.title: Crosshair targeting
items.description: GetCrosshairRef — refId/baseId/name/type of what player is looking at via CrosshairPickData.

items.title: Faction membership
items.description: List player's factions with ranks, join/leave factions, set rank.

items.title: NPC detailed info
items.description: Class, combat style, voice type, outfit, home location.

items.title: NPC inventory
items.description: Read any NPC's inventory, not just player.

items.title: Follower management
items.description: List current followers, dismiss, recruit via faction/relationship.

items.title: Detection state
items.description: Player detection state per NPC (unaware, suspicious, detected).

items.title: Disease/cure management
items.description: List diseases, cure specific diseases, check vampirism/lycanthropy.

items.title: Enchantment info
items.description: Read enchantments on equipped items, charge levels.

items.title: Magic resistance
items.description: Read all resistance values (fire, frost, shock, poison, magic, disease).

items.title: Spell details
items.description: Cost, casting type, delivery, school, effect list per spell.

items.title: Power management
items.description: Daily powers usage tracking, lesser powers.

items.title: Merchant detection
items.description: Find nearby merchants, their specializations.

items.title: Merchant inventory
items.description: Read what a merchant has for sale.

items.title: Bounty management
items.description: Read/clear bounties per hold.

items.title: Property ownership
items.description: List owned houses, available properties.

items.title: Detailed combat state
items.description: Target, group members, fleeing status.

items.title: Damage analysis
items.description: Current weapon damage, armor rating, resistances.

items.title: Threat assessment
items.description: Nearby hostile actors with levels and equipment.

items.title: HUD notifications
items.description: ShowNotification via RE::DebugNotification. Auto-notify on key actions.

items.title: Menu state query
items.description: Which menus are open, is game paused.

items.title: Map marker management
items.description: Add/remove custom map markers. MapMarkerFramework plugin detected.

items.title: Journal integration
items.description: Read journal entries, add custom notes.

items.title: Quest completion scripts
items.description: Multi-step quest resolution (set stages, add items, move NPCs, update factions).

items.title: Apply character blueprint
items.description: Import blueprint JSON: set skills, add perks, add spells, teach shouts, add items, equip, set stats.

items.title: Spawn NPC from blueprint
items.description: Create runtime NPC with face morphs, stats, perks, spells, equipment. Add to CurrentFollowerFaction (0x0005C84E) for follower behavior. Voice type assignment. NFF template NPC as optional base for persistence.

items.title: Loot scanner
items.description: Scan nearby containers and report valuable items.

items.title: Game state snapshot
items.description: Full dump of player state for backup/analysis.

items.title: Scripted scenes
items.description: Move NPCs, set relationships, trigger events for custom scenarios.

items.title: Music control
items.description: Change music track, battle music state.

items.title: Volume control
items.description: Master/category volume adjustment.

items.title: Play idle animations
items.description: Trigger specific idles on player or NPCs.

items.title: Screenshot trigger
items.description: Take screenshots programmatically.

infrastructure.title: Event system
infrastructure.description: 17 event types via ScriptEventSourceHolder sinks. PollEvents with filters.

infrastructure.title: SKSE plugin scanner
infrastructure.description: GetLoadedSKSEPlugins scans Data/SKSE/Plugins/*.dll with integration notes.

infrastructure.title: Form search engine
infrastructure.description: SearchForms — direct form database search replacing console help command.

infrastructure.title: Load order query
infrastructure.description: GetLoadOrder + GetModFormIdPrefix for ESP/ESL index lookup.

infrastructure.title: VPrint hook
infrastructure.description: Full console output capture for multi-line command results.

infrastructure.title: Config file
infrastructure.description: .ini or .toml for pipe name, log level, feature toggles, event blacklist.

infrastructure.title: Performance caching
infrastructure.description: Cache frequently queried data to reduce game thread blocking.

infrastructure.title: Push events via pipe
infrastructure.description: Pipe Protocol v2 — unsolicited event messages from plugin to client.

infrastructure.title: Plugin DI system
infrastructure.description: Dynamic integration with detected SKSE plugins via LoadLibrary/GetProcAddress.

infrastructure.title: Console output capture incomplete
infrastructure.description: lastMessage only captures last line. VPrint hook needed for full multi-line output.

keyDiscoveries: Dot-notation console commands work: refId.command correctly targets NPCs.
get_nearby_npcs returns reference IDs. setessential needs base FormID, kill/prid need ref ID.
CompileAndRun needs RELOCATION_ID 441582 for Skyrim >= 1.6.1130 (ConsoleUtilSSE approach).
Event system captures everything but framework quests (NFF etc.) spam start/stop events.
Save game with 4000+ plugins takes 10+ seconds — async fire-and-forget is required.
Static linking (x64-windows-static) required — dynamic linking causes SKSE load failure.
